description.value:
Used as a replacement for skills rolled with base COOL, EMP, or WILL

Used for rolling in checks which involve force of will, charisma, general intelligence, or intution. Note that if the check is specialized and the mook is not, the DV should be raised 1-3 tiers.

Used as a replacement for fighting or ranged weapon skills, excluding evasion. Note that this uses REF as a base for reasons involving initiative - set REF of the mook first, then consider that number when considering the Martial skill.
Used as a replacement for skills which rely on base Body or Dex, which are not covered by the Martial skill, and for Evasion.
Used for skills which rely on base INT or TECH.
An armored external linear frame, integrated directly with the cyberware of the wearer for high performance.
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.
A cybernetical replacement arm. Comes with a free hand.
Increases your BODY stat to 12 (adjusting your HP and Wound Threshold and Death Save)
A foldable bulletproof shield that can be drawn or stowed easily. Can't hold anything with this hand while activated.
A concealable one-handed Ranged Weapon. Can't hold anything with this hand while activated.
Requires an arm and has HP that is reduced by damage.
Bring out the big guns. This rocket launcher will do some damage.
Double ablation to armor.
Basic ammo, nothing special.
An Exotic Shotgun that uses the Heavy Weapons Skill. Refer to the full item description on pg. 348.
If damage dealt to target they are set alight. Target takes 2 damage to HP at end of their turn unless they use action to extinguish flames. Does not stack.
A standard-issue assault rifle.

Functions like a standard grenade launcher, but with a magazine size of 1. Requires 2 hands to use, and takes up 2 attachment slots. While attached, the weapon can't be concealed under clothing.

Note that the weapon inherits any modifiers from the gun it is attached to, such as other attachments and quality.
Increases magazine size to a massive 45 bullets.

Thermite rounds bury into a target and briefly ignite. When a round hits a target, it deals 1 damage to that target, ignoring armor, in addition to any other damage. If a 1 is rolled while firing, the weapon jams.
Double ablation to armor.
Generic Medium Melee Weapon.

information.notes:
Mook Tier - Tier 5x/Special Boss Threat - An isolated, specialized, high-level agent that will likely pose a significant threat even without any backup.

Corp-Wide Ability - Advanced Tactics: Once per round after a Militech goon has taken an action, select another goon of the same type; they may immediately take the same action, if eligible to do so.

Ability - Weapon Slam: Integrated synth-muscle allows the demolitionist to slam enemies with their held weapon - or anything else. Regardless of equipment, the demolitionist is also always equipped with a RoF 3, 2d6 damage medium melee weapon. When rolling endurance for suppressive effects, roll Physical instead of Lowdown. Demolitionists cannot be set on fire or poisoned.

Extra Gear - Choose one of the following:

  • In-Built Rocket launcher & 3 armor-piercing rockets

  • In-Built Flamethrower & 20 incendiary shells

  • Assault Rifle w/ underbarrel grenade launcher, drum magazine, 3 armor-piercing grenades, and 135 rounds of Thermite rifle ammunition
